it:62.3: "Tīṇimāni, bhikkhave, indriyāni. Katamāni tīṇi? Anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ, aññindriyaṁ, aññātāvindriyaṁ – imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi indriyānī"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:62.4:
"Sekhassa sikkhamānassa,
ujumaggānusārino;
Khayasmiṁ paṭhamaṁ ñāṇaṁ,
tato aññā anantarā.
it:62.5:
Tato aññā vimuttassa,
ñāṇaṁ ve hoti tādino;
Akuppā me vimuttīti,
bhavasaṁyojanakkhayā.
it:62.6:
Sa ve indriyasampanno,
santo santipade rato;
Dhāreti antimaṁ dehaṁ,
jetvā māraṁ savāhinin"ti.
it:62.7:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Tatiyaṁ.
